meanings.definition: forceful prevention; putting down by power or authority
impair the respiration of or obstruct the air passage of
examples: The foul air was slowly suffocating the children

meanings.definition: be asphyxiated; die from lack of oxygen
examples: The child suffocated under the pillow

meanings.definition: characterized by oppressive heat and humidity
examples: the summer was sultry and oppressive
the sulfurous atmosphere preceding a thunderstorm
